Actual Delivery Date.definition: Date when the product was actually delivered to the customer.

Requested Delivery Date.definition: Delivery date requested by the customer.

InFull.pql_logic: CASE WHEN "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Delivered Quantity" >= "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
InFull.sql_logic: CASE WHEN so."Delivered Quantity" >= so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
InFull.definition: Checks whether delivered quantity meets ordered quantity.

Shipment Affected.pql_logic: CASE WHEN ("Supply_Chain_KPI_Single_Sheet_5500_csv"."Shipment Affected"=1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Shipment Affected.sql_logic: CASE WHEN ss."Shipment Affected" = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Stock Shortage in Warehouse.pql_logic: CASE WHEN "Warehouse DIM_csv"."QUANTITY" < "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Stock Shortage in Warehouse.sql_logic: CASE WHEN wd."QUANTITY" < so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Transport Delay.pql_logic: CASE WHEN "Supply_Chain_KPI_Tuned_5500_csv"."Delivery Impacted by Route Disruptions" = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Transport Delay.sql_logic: CASE WHEN sk."Delivery Impacted by Route Disruptions" = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Warehouse Issue.pql_logic: CASE WHEN ("Supply_Chain_KPI_Single_Sheet_5500_csv"."Warehouse Issue"!='None') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Warehouse Issue.sql_logic: CASE WHEN ss."Warehouse Issue" != 'None' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Warehouse Issue.definition: Operational issues occurring in warehouse (labour shortage, inventory mismatch, system downtime).

On Time.pql_logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" != NULL_DATE AND "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" != NULL_DATE AND "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" <= "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
On Time.sql_logic: CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" IS NOT NULL AND so."Requested_Delivery_Date" IS NOT NULL AND dd."Delivery_Date" <= so."Requested_Delivery_Date" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
On Time.definition: Checks whether delivery occurred before or on requested date.

Avg Delay Duration.pql_logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" > "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" THEN TIME_BETWEEN("_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date","_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date") END
Avg Delay Duration.sql_logic: CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" > so."Requested_Delivery_Date" THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) * 1000 ELSE NULL END
Avg Delay Duration.definition: Time difference between requested and actual delivery date when delivery is late.

Delay Risk.pql_logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" > "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" AND "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Delivered Quantity" < "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Delay Risk.sql_logic: CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" > so."Requested_Delivery_Date" AND so."Delivered Quantity" < so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Delay Risk.definition: Identifies orders delayed and not fully delivered.

Open Orders.pql_logic: CASE WHEN ("Delivery DIM_csv"."Delivery_Status"!='Delivered') OR ("Sales Order DIM_csv"."Delivered Quantity" < "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity") THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Open Orders.sql_logic: CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Status" != 'Delivered' OR so."Delivered Quantity" < so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Open Orders.definition: Orders not yet fully delivered or partially delivered.

Orders at Risk.pql_logic: CASE WHEN ("Delivery DIM_csv"."Delivery_Status")!= 'Delivered' AND "Supply_Chain_KPI_Tuned_5500_csv"."Delay Reason for Delivery" != NULL_TEXT THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Orders at Risk.sql_logic: CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Status" != 'Delivered' AND sk."Delay Reason for Delivery" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Orders at Risk.definition: Orders likely to be delayed due to issues (e.g. Carrier, traffic, weather).

OTIF.pql_logic: CASE WHEN "_ARIS.Case"."Actual delivery Date" <= "_ARIS.Case"."Requested Delivery Date" AND "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Delivered Quantity" >= "Sales Order DIM_csv"."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
OTIF.sql_logic: CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" <= so."Requested_Delivery_Date" AND so."Delivered Quantity" >= so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Avg Days Delay Duration.sql_logic: CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" > so."Requested_Delivery_Date" THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 ELSE NULL END
Avg Days Delay Duration.definition: Average delay duration converted from milliseconds to days.

On Time Probability.pql_logic: QUERY(SUM("_ARIS.Case"."On- time") / CT("Sales Order DIM_csv"."Sales Order Number"))
On Time Probability.sql_logic: SUM(CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" IS NOT NULL AND so."Requested_Delivery_Date" IS NOT NULL AND dd."Delivery_Date" <= so."Requested_Delivery_Date" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)
On Time Probability.definition: Percentage of orders delivered on time.

In-Full Probability.pql_logic: QUERY(SUM("_ARIS.Case"."In-full") / CT("Sales Order DIM_csv"."Sales Order Number"))
In-Full Probability.sql_logic: SUM(CASE WHEN so."Delivered Quantity" >= so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)
In-Full Probability.definition: Percentage of orders delivered in full.

Risk Ratio.sql_logic: (CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" > so."Requested_Delivery_Date" AND so."Delivered Quantity" < so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN wd."QUANTITY" < so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sk."Delivery Impacted by Route Disruptions" = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 3.0
Risk Ratio.definition: Combined risk indicator — average of three risk signals.

Days Range Delay.sql_logic: CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 > 0 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 <= 10 THEN 'A.1-10' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 >= 11 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 <= 20 THEN 'B.11-20' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 >= 21 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 <= 30 THEN 'C.21-30' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 >= 31 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dd."Delivery_Date" - so."Requested_Delivery_Date")) / 86400.0 <= 40 THEN 'D.31-40' ELSE 'Delay More than 40 Days' END

Check Predictive OTIF.pql_logic: CASE WHEN ("_ARIS.Case"."Risk ratio") > 0.4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Check Predictive OTIF.sql_logic: CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" > so."Requested_Delivery_Date" AND so."Delivered Quantity" < so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN wd."QUANTITY" < so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sk."Delivery Impacted by Route Disruptions" = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 3.0 > 0.4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Check Predictive OTIF.definition: Predicts whether an order is likely to fail OTIF. 0.4 threshold suggested by client.

Predictive OTIF %.sql_logic: (SUM(CASE WHEN dd."Delivery_Date" <= so."Requested_Delivery_Date" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) * (SUM(CASE WHEN so."Delivered Quantity" >= so."Order Quantity" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*))

Delivery on time %.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = 'Delivery on time %' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Delivery on time %.definition: Percentage of orders delivered on time — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

Avg. Delay days.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = 'Avg. Delay days' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Avg. Delay days.definition: Average delay in days — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

# Materials.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = '# Materials' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
# Materials.definition: Total number of distinct materials handled — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

Orders At Risk.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = 'Orders At Risk' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Orders At Risk.definition: Percentage or count of orders at risk of failing delivery — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

Delay Order Value(EUR).sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = 'Delay Order Value(EUR)' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Delay Order Value(EUR).definition: Total monetary value of delayed orders in EUR — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

Packing accuracy.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = 'Packing accuracy' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Packing accuracy.definition: Percentage of orders packed correctly — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

# Shipment Affected.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = '# Shipment Affected' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
# Shipment Affected.definition: Count of shipments affected by disruptions — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

Value at Risk (EUR).sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = 'Value at Risk (EUR)' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Value at Risk (EUR).definition: Total value of orders at financial risk in EUR — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

Savings lost (EUR).sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = 'Savings lost (EUR)' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Savings lost (EUR).definition: Total savings lost due to supply chain failures in EUR — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

Utilization Efficiency %.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = 'Utilization Efficiency %' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Utilization Efficiency %.definition: Warehouse or transport utilization efficiency as a percentage — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

#Warehouse.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = '#Warehouse' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
#Warehouse.definition: Total number of active warehouses — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.

# Total Operators.sql_logic: SELECT name AS kpi_name, value AS kpi_value, created_at FROM cases WHERE name = '# Total Operators' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
# Total Operators.definition: Total number of operators active in the supply chain — pre-aggregated ARIS dashboard value.
